name: smarzban-skills
description: A personal collection of reusable agent skills, packaged as installable plugins.

plugins.name: agent-sdlc
plugins.description: Full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents: idea -> acceptance criteria -> architecture -> techstack -> atomic task plan -> readiness gate -> test-first subagent-driven build -> reviewed PR. Run the whole chain or invoke any stage standalone, resolving its input from any source (prompt, doc, Linear, repo) without weakening the gate or traceability. Plus three documentation skills: the front-door README, the repo essentials (install, usage, contributing, community-health files), and full technical internals under a coverage contract.
